NN_SPLMTL_FINCL_CNTCT_FAIL_SW 

LABEL: Navigated Supplemental HRSN Financial Strain Attempts to Reach Failed 

DESCRIPTION: Navigation needs (NN): navigated supplemental health related social need (HRSN) financial strain 
attempts to reach failed. 

LONG NAME: NN_SPLMTL_FINCL_CNTCT_FAIL_SW 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system (derived) 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes
